meta.name: Generate visual diagrams and content assets from ideas with Claude and NapkinAI

name: NapkinAI - Convert Raw Ideas into Visual Diagrams & Content Assets

parameters.content:
# 🎨 NapkinAI Visual Idea Processor

Automates the transformation of raw text ideas into structured visual diagrams and content assets using NapkinAI.

## 🔄 Workflow Stages

### 1. **Input Collection**
   - Webhook trigger accepts raw idea text
   - Manual trigger for testing
   - Configurable idea metadata (title, type, audience)

### 2. **AI Idea Enrichment (Claude)**
   - Expands raw idea into structured concept
   - Extracts key themes and relationships
   - Suggests optimal diagram types
   - Generates multiple visual concepts

### 3. **NapkinAI Processing**
   - Authenticate with NapkinAI API
   - Submit enriched text for visual generation
   - Poll for completion status
   - Retrieve generated diagram assets

### 4. **Asset Management**
   - Download generated visuals
   - Store metadata in database
   - Organize by project/category

### 5. **Delivery**
   - Email with visual assets attached
   - Slack notification with preview
   - Save to Google Drive / Notion

## ⚙️ Setup Required
- NapkinAI API credentials
- Anthropic API key (Claude)
- SMTP for email delivery
- Slack webhook (optional)
- PostgreSQL for logging (optional)

## 📥 INPUT TRIGGERS
Webhook or manual trigger to start idea processing pipeline

## 🤖 AI ENRICHMENT (CLAUDE)
Expand idea, extract structure, suggest diagram types, generate prompts for NapkinAI

## 🖼️ NAPKINAI VISUAL GENERATION
Authenticate → Submit text → Poll status → Retrieve visual assets

## 📨 ASSET DELIVERY & LOGGING
Process assets, send notifications, log to database, deliver to team

nodes.notes: Accepts POST requests with raw idea text and metadata

nodes.notes: Use this for testing the workflow manually

nodes.name: Set Test Idea Data

assignments.name: body.title
assignments.value: How SaaS Companies Scale from 0 to 1M Users

assignments.name: body.rawIdea
assignments.value: SaaS companies grow through product-led growth, viral loops, and network effects. Early traction comes from solving a specific pain point, then expanding. Key phases: discovery, activation, retention, referral, revenue. Marketing channels evolve from founder-led sales to inbound content to paid acquisition. Infrastructure must scale horizontally. Team grows from generalists to specialists.

nodes.name: Merge Input Sources
nodes.notes: Combines webhook and manual trigger inputs into single flow

nodes.name: Validate & Normalize Input
nodes.notes: Validates required fields and normalizes input structure

nodes.name: AI - Enrich & Structure Idea
nodes.notes: Claude analyzes the raw idea and generates structured content for NapkinAI

parameters.name: system
parameters.value: You are an expert at transforming raw ideas into structured visual concepts optimized for diagram generation. You understand visual hierarchy, information design, and how to represent complex concepts clearly. Always respond with valid JSON only — no preamble, no markdown fences.

parameters.name: messages

nodes.name: Parse Claude Enrichment
nodes.notes: Extracts and merges Claude's structured analysis with original idea data

nodes.notes: Authenticates with NapkinAI and retrieves access token

nodes.name: NapkinAI - Submit Idea for Visual
nodes.notes: Submits the enriched text to NapkinAI to generate a visual diagram

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.value: ={{ { ideaId: $node['Parse Claude Enrichment'].json.ideaId, title: $node['Parse Claude Enrichment'].json.title } }}

nodes.name: NapkinAI - Poll Generation Status
nodes.notes: Polls NapkinAI job status until visual generation is complete

nodes.name: Wait 5s - Retry Poll
nodes.notes: Waits 5 seconds before polling again if job not complete

nodes.notes: Downloads all generated visual assets from NapkinAI

nodes.name: Assemble Full Output Package
nodes.notes: Combines idea data, AI enrichment, and NapkinAI assets into final output

nodes.notes: Delivers generated visual assets and content strategy via email

nodes.notes: Posts a quick Slack notification with visual preview and key links

nodes.notes: Stores complete output record in PostgreSQL for analytics and retrieval

nodes.notes: Tracks processed ideas in workflow static data to avoid reprocessing
